title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available
company: Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Manufacturing Engineer for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates:
Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates!
